top_signals.title: Netanyahu opponent leads polls ahead of Israeli elections
top_signals.summary: Former military chief Gadi Eisenkot has overtaken prime minister as country sets October date for vote
top_signals.why_it_matters: Geopolitical escalation affecting commodities, shipping and cross-asset volatility.

top_signals.title: Meta's Louisiana data center investment to reach $50 billion, aided by generous tax incentives
top_signals.summary: Meta said the planned Hyperion data center supercluster in Richland Parish, Louisiana, will be a 5GW facility and cost more than $50 billion.
top_signals.why_it_matters: AI and semiconductor developments impacting technology leadership and capex cycles.

top_signals.title: Zurich Ranks Top in Disposable Income Poll Despite $7 Coffees
top_signals.summary: Zurich and Geneva may be the most expensive places in the world to buy your meat and veg but it’ll still pay off as the two Swiss cities top a new survey of the highest disposable incomes in the world.

top_signals.title: Commission greenlights Cyprus's sixth payment request for €120 million under NextGenerationEU
top_signals.summary: European Commission Press release Brussels, 13 Jul 2026 Today, the Commission positively assessed Cyprus's sixth payment request under the Recovery and Resilience Facility, the centrepiece of NextGenerationEU.

top_signals.title: Tech stocks feel like the only game in town. Here's why they are so hard to abandon - CNBC
top_signals.summary: Tech stocks feel like the only game in town. Here's why they are so hard to abandon  CNBC
